{{Infobox character
| name = Petrus
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Petrus is an aging, stout [[Naraka Traveler]] characterized by his balding head and pudgy physique. He serves as an attendant or companion to [[Lady]] [[Adrienne]], often guiding her through various locations and providing information regarding the dangers of [[Naraka]]. During a confrontation involving [[Simon]], Petrus attempted to defend himself using a swarm of large, glowing orange wasps summoned from his red-marked hand. However, he was severely injured when the blade [[Azura]] severed his left hand at the wrist, leaving him in a state of shock and requiring [[Malachi]] to apply a makeshift tourniquet to prevent him from bleeding to death. Throughout his interactions, he has demonstrated knowledge regarding the [[Naraka Incarnation]] and the nature of the environment, though he often expresses a sense of dread or resignation regarding their circumstances.}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Petrus]] is a fat, balding man in red robes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Petrus]] is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Petrus]] has a red-marked hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Petrus]] has a bleeding hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Petrus]] is a pudgy, balding [[Naraka Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Petrus]] is a balding, one-armed [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
